selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a solid understanding of the reasons why people create and share false information. This includes recognizing that fake content can be used for various purposes, such as manipulating public opinion, spreading propaganda, or simply having fun. By understanding the motivations behind fake content, individuals can better navigate social media platforms and make informed decisions about what to trust and what to ignore.",
"reasoning_summary": "To derive an informed opinion on how to manage and deal with fake content on social media, we must first consider the reasons why people create and share false information. By understanding the motivations behind fake content, individuals can better navigate social media platforms and make informed decisions about what to trust and what to ignore.",
"tone": "educated",

}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a solid understanding of the reasons why people create and share false information. This includes recognizing that fake content can be used for various purposes, such as manipulating public opinion, spreading propaganda, or simply having fun. By understanding the motivations behind fake content, individuals can better navigate social media platforms and make informed decisions about what to trust and what to ignore.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To derive an informed opinion on how to manage and deal with fake content on social media, we must first consider the reasons why people create and share false information. By understanding the motivations behind fake content, individuals can better navigate social media platforms and make informed decisions about what to trust and what to ignore.
